message:
fix: Add missing 3 tests to @core group - now covers all 390 CPython tests

Added missing tests to core.txt:
- smtplib (between slice and smtpnet)
- urllib2net (between urllib2_localnet and urllib_response)
- zstd (after zlib)

Coverage verification:
- Total CPython tests: 390
- Tests in groups: 390 (288 core + 17 linux + 25 macos + 92 windows with overlaps)
- Missing: 0
- All 390 tests are now covered

Updated CI @core count from 286 to 288.
